_comment: Copy this file to .local/real-session-corpus.json and populate with paths to your actual local session files. The real-session-corpus.json file is gitignored — do NOT commit it.

sessions.id: string — unique tag for this entry (e.g., a short UUID prefix)
sessions.path: string — absolute path to the JSONL session file on your machine

sessions._comment: Replace with a real local path. The test will skip if the file does not exist.
Example: a session with thinking blocks
Example: a Codex session with function_call / function_call_output
Example: a Codex session with custom_tool_call / custom_tool_call_output
